think, Nithin, you have collected these also, right?

not here I'm talking, like, in that sheet.

And I am, like, we have a prompt.

People might not go to Airbyte website because that's informational query.

The query should be like that.
So we have some keywords I'll send, sorry, prompts which I'll send you.
But if you have any other thing, like how do you want to set up this, let me know.

As we continue to add prompts, just make sure we tag them correctly.
And the topics or the prompts that we have added here, do we have content on all these prompts?

Just a quick note on the Agent Connectors page.

Yes, I drafted the update in Webflow, but I didn't hit publish.

Nithin, there are some issues also, I think.
If you go down to granola page, you can see it's showing cells.

I think you can take internally what is the issue.
Just make sure you don't publish anything.
We take care of that after that.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content strategy, publishing workflow, and website updates.](https://fathom.video/share/pxQzZpD4sWxy5bvd7Q1fBmmdt__HovhM?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Strategy Shift:** Prioritize high-volume keywords from competitor research to capture demand and drive initial traffic, deprioritizing topics with no search volume.](https://fathom.video/share/pxQzZpD4sWxy5bvd7Q1fBmmdt__HovhM?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [**"Check That" Tool Refocus:** Revise prompts to target tool-based queries (e.g., "AI tools for data integration") where Airbyte can be a direct answer, driving high-intent traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/pxQzZpD4sWxy5bvd7Q1fBmmdt__HovhM?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
  - [**New Publishing Workflow:** Erik will draft all new articles in Webflow; Nithin will publish them post-launch to prevent accidental publication before the site is ready.](https://fathom.video/share/pxQzZpD4sWxy5bvd7Q1fBmmdt__HovhM?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**Website Fixes:** The "Agent Connectors" page requires fixes for a missing Granola icon and a misplaced Salesforce section.](https://fathom.video/share/pxQzZpD4sWxy5bvd7Q1fBmmdt__HovhM?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Keyword Prioritization

  - [**Problem:** The Airtable topic backlog contains many topics with zero search volume, yielding no traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/pxQzZpD4sWxy5bvd7Q1fBmmdt__HovhM?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)
  - [**Solution:** Shift focus to high-volume keywords from competitor research to capture demand and drive initial traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/pxQzZpD4sWxy5bvd7Q1fBmmdt__HovhM?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [**Action:** Tanmay will review the competitor keyword list and the Airtable backlog, then share a prioritized list with Erik.](https://fathom.video/share/pxQzZpD4sWxy5bvd7Q1fBmmdt__HovhM?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
  - [**Implementation:** Erik will add these to Airtable, potentially in a new "Competitor Keywords" cluster for clear tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/pxQzZpD4sWxy5bvd7Q1fBmmdt__HovhM?tab=summary&timestamp=908.0)

### "Check That" Tool Strategy

  - [**Problem:** Current prompts for the "Check That" tool (which monitors how LLMs answer questions) are too generic, leading to informational answers that don't drive traffic to Airbyte.](https://fathom.video/share/pxQzZpD4sWxy5bvd7Q1fBmmdt__HovhM?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [**Solution:** Revise prompts to target tool-based queries where Airbyte can be a direct answer.](https://fathom.video/share/pxQzZpD4sWxy5bvd7Q1fBmmdt__HovhM?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
      - [**Example:** "Platforms for building AI agents with direct connectors."](https://fathom.video/share/pxQzZpD4sWxy5bvd7Q1fBmmdt__HovhM?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
  - [**Action:** Tanmay will send a new list of tool-based prompts to Erik.](https://fathom.video/share/pxQzZpD4sWxy5bvd7Q1fBmmdt__HovhM?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
  - [**Implementation:** Erik will add these to the tool, using tags to group and filter prompts by topic.](https://fathom.video/share/pxQzZpD4sWxy5bvd7Q1fBmmdt__HovhM?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)

### Publishing Workflow & Website Updates

  - [**Context:** The main product launch is delayed until next Tuesday.](https://fathom.video/share/pxQzZpD4sWxy5bvd7Q1fBmmdt__HovhM?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [**New Workflow:** To prevent accidental publication before the site is ready, Erik will draft all new articles in Webflow, and Nithin will publish them after the launch.](https://fathom.video/share/pxQzZpD4sWxy5bvd7Q1fBmmdt__HovhM?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**Website Fixes:**](https://fathom.video/share/pxQzZpD4sWxy5bvd7Q1fBmmdt__HovhM?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)
      - [**Agent Connectors Page:**](https://fathom.video/share/pxQzZpD4sWxy5bvd7Q1fBmmdt__HovhM?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)
          - [**Granola Icon:** Missing because it's not a "Data Replication" connector. Erik has a draft fix in Webflow.](https://fathom.video/share/pxQzZpD4sWxy5bvd7Q1fBmmdt__HovhM?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)
          - [**Salesforce Section:** A misplaced Salesforce section appears at the bottom of the Granola page. Erik will investigate with Kurt.](https://fathom.video/share/pxQzZpD4sWxy5bvd7Q1fBmmdt__HovhM?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)
      - [**Process:** All fixes must be staged for review before publishing. Nithin will monitor new connectors added via GitHub to ensure they display correctly.](https://fathom.video/share/pxQzZpD4sWxy5bvd7Q1fBmmdt__HovhM?tab=summary&timestamp=1760.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tanmay:**](https://fathom.video/share/pxQzZpD4sWxy5bvd7Q1fBmmdt__HovhM?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
      - [Review competitor keyword list and Airtable backlog → Send prioritized list to Erik.](https://fathom.video/share/pxQzZpD4sWxy5bvd7Q1fBmmdt__HovhM?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
      - [Send new list of tool-based prompts to Erik.](https://fathom.video/share/pxQzZpD4sWxy5bvd7Q1fBmmdt__HovhM?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/pxQzZpD4sWxy5bvd7Q1fBmmdt__HovhM?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [Update Airtable with the new prioritized keyword list.](https://fathom.video/share/pxQzZpD4sWxy5bvd7Q1fBmmdt__HovhM?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
      - [Add new tool-based prompts to the "Check That" tool with topic tags.](https://fathom.video/share/pxQzZpD4sWxy5bvd7Q1fBmmdt__HovhM?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
      - [Investigate and fix the Salesforce section on the Granola page with Kurt.](https://fathom.video/share/pxQzZpD4sWxy5bvd7Q1fBmmdt__HovhM?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)
      - [Draft all new articles in Webflow for Nithin to publish post-launch.](https://fathom.video/share/pxQzZpD4sWxy5bvd7Q1fBmmdt__HovhM?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**Nithin:**](https://fathom.video/share/pxQzZpD4sWxy5bvd7Q1fBmmdt__HovhM?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [Publish articles drafted by Erik after the product launch.](https://fathom.video/share/pxQzZpD4sWxy5bvd7Q1fBmmdt__HovhM?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [Monitor new connectors added via GitHub for correct website display.](https://fathom.video/share/pxQzZpD4sWxy5bvd7Q1fBmmdt__HovhM?tab=summary&timestamp=1769.0)

action_items.description: Review Erik's 'The Decline of RAG' article
Draft all articles; coordinate w/ Nithin to publish
Review keyword sheet; share prioritized list w/ Erik
Add 'New keywords' cluster in Airtable; import Tanmay's list
Send updated CheckThat prompts to Erik; then Erik uploads/tags
Send CheckThat UI feedback to product re: single-line prompts
Check internally if content exists for CheckThat prompts
Draft use-case landing page; share w/ Erik
Publish Granola icon on Agent Connectors page (Webflow)
Fix Granola page issue (shows Salesforce); coordinate w/ Kurt to stage
Monitor GitHub for new connectors; ensure site accuracy
Add 2 new agentic data articles to review
